ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "key" REAL /* Key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song (in BPM) */,
  "duration_ms" REAL /* Duration of the song (in milliseconds) */,
  "time_signature" REAL /* Time signature of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the artist (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the album's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song in the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date when the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the feedback */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song being feedbacked */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback given by the user */,
  "feedback_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song being recommended */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "listening_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening history */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened to the song */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song being listened to */,
  "listen_at" TEXT /* Date when the song was listened to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listening_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id")
)
